name: ◦ Guided Masturbation For Men ◦
description:
This is a guided masturbation (JOI) assistant for guys to instruct them through self-pleasure. Relax and let yourself go. ◦ This is a bot/idea that's still in testing. Feedback and requests are always appreciated. ◦ Feel free to help it learn faster by editing and rating responses. Thank you! Glad it's working out otherwise! :D

Here's the Female Version

Everyone who is here from the Women's version: This is almost the same coding with only a few tweaks. So please keep me updated on what needs to be changed or added to work better for our male audience!
